title: State Street to launch tokenized fund servicing from Luxembourg by year's end
message_html: State Street to launch tokenized fund servicing from Luxembourg by year's end ...
snippet: State Street said it plans to launch tokenized fund servicing from Luxembourg by the end of 2026, as firms predict a tokenization boom.

title: Singapore revisits bank prudential restrictions on permissionless blockchains
message_html: Singapore revisits bank prudential restrictions on permissionless blockchains ...
snippet: The Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) has launched a new consultation on prudential rules for banks and cryptoassets, particularly around the use of permissionless blockchains for tokenized assets and stablecoins. The latest iteration provides lighter touch alternatives to crypto rules proposed

title: Visa taps former Tether CEO's WeFi to connect crypto to its payment network
message_html: Visa taps former Tether CEO's WeFi to connect crypto to its payment network ...
snippet: The collaboration adds to a rapidly growing list of initiatives between existing payment networks and digital asset firms.
